summary: Iteration 4 testing: 32/32 backend pytest tests pass (5 new + 27 regression). Frontend verified end-to-end on mobile viewport (390x844): clickable index cards (NIFTY 50/BANKNIFTY/FINNIFTY navigate to /options, SENSEX is no-op), 'TAP FOR OPTION CHAIN' hint visible on 3 cards, chevron icon present, WS-driven LIVE LTP updates confirmed (NIFTY changed 22119.10 -> 22228.88 in 4.5s), ATM row 22150 styled with gold bg rgba(255,204,0,0.2) + 3px gold left border, gold ATM badge, gold strike text, and CE/PE tap navigates to /order with full params (SL=LTP-4 / Target=LTP+6 visible).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard tap-target on index cards is good (vertical padding 14, horizontal 16) - meets 44px min touch target.

Live LTP color (red/green) on dashboard is recomputed from WS using (i.ltp - i.change) as the baseline — works but if WS arrives BEFORE first REST load, baseline could be stale. Not a bug today since REST loads first.
Options screen keeps WS open across data refreshes (good) but subscribes on every `data` change — server will accept duplicate subs into a Set, so no leak.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow uses testID 'login-with-upstox-button'. Dashboard testIDs: index-NIFTY 50, index-BANKNIFTY, index-SENSEX, index-FINNIFTY. Options page testIDs: opt-row-{strike}, ce-{strike}, pe-{strike}. WS endpoint: wss://<base>/api/ws/market accepts {action:'subscribe', symbols:[...], access_token?:str}. ATM gold = #FFCC00; ATM bg = rgba(255,204,0,0.20). Note: getComputedStyle on RN Web Text returns black due to nested element structure — verify gold colors visually via screenshot, not JS evaluate.
